name: Complete DMEM (10% FBS)

notes.en: Prepare under sterile conditions. Heat-inactivate FBS at 56°C for 30 min. Complete medium stored at 4°C for up to 4 weeks. Pre-warm to 37°C before use. Suitable for HEK293, HeLa, NIH3T3, and other adherent cell lines.
notes.zh: 无菌操作。FBS 需 56°C 灭活 30 min。完全培养基 4°C 保存不超过 4 周。使用前预热至 37°C。适用于 HEK293、HeLa、NIH3T3 等贴壁细胞系。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed.; ATCC cell culture guide

storage.notes: Sterile; prepare in BSC; add FBS after warming

usage.en: DMEM complete medium (10% FBS) for standard mammalian cell line culture.
usage.zh: 含 10% FBS 的 DMEM 完全培养基，用于常规哺乳动物细胞培养。

prepSteps.step: To 500 mL DMEM base medium, add 50 mL heat-inactivated FBS (10% final).
Add 5 mL L-glutamine (200 mM, 2 mM final) if not GlutaMAX.
Store at 4°C for up to 1 month. Pre-warm to 37°C before use.
